description: Canonical output schema for plywood sensitivity swarm agents. All three regional swarms (Alpha/Beta/Gamma) must write JSON conforming to this structure.

product_reference.description: 18mm structural plywood, 1220x2440mm, moisture content ≤12%, F17/equivalent grade

vulnerability_weights.notes: Weights sum to 1.0. Each dimension scored 0–10; multiply by weight for composite score (0–10 total).

sensitivity_per_10_bbl.description: USD/m3 increase in total delivered cost per $10 rise in Brent Crude

electricity_usd_per_m3.notes: Grid cost increase; 0 if own biomass generation

labor_usd_per_m3.notes: Indirect — wage inflation from energy costs; typically 0-1 for low-wage countries

exceeds_25_threshold.notes: Flag if total > $25/m3 per $10 oil rise

baseline_costs_usd_per_m3.description: Current Q1 2026 cost components at $92/bbl baseline

drying_energy.notes: Separate from grid electricity if biomass

labor.notes: Worker-days per m3 × daily wage rate

freight_to_long_beach.notes: null if no West Coast route

vulnerability_score.notes: Weighted composite. 10 = most vulnerable to energy price increases.

fx_buffer.notes: Inverted: higher score = LESS buffer (more vulnerable)

currency_shield_pct_per_10_bbl.notes: % of $10/bbl cost increase absorbed by local currency depreciation vs USD. Positive = currency weakening provides buffer.

mfn_duty_pct.notes: US MFN tariff rate. 0 for FTA partners (Canada via USMCA, Chile via US-Chile FTA)

fta_status.example: USMCA zero-duty | US-Chile FTA zero-duty | MFN 8% | GSP reduced

key_risks.notes: Top 3-5 specific risks for this country's export competitiveness

structural_flags.notes: Policy, regulatory, or supply chain structural changes affecting long-term trajectory

data_confidence.notes: high = official sources confirmed; medium = indicative/estimated; low = limited data availability

validation_rules: total_usd_per_m3 must equal sum of resin + log + electricity + freight + labor components
exceeds_25_threshold must be true if total_usd_per_m3 > 25
analysis_date must match the swarm run date
brent_baseline_usd must match the monitoring-config.json last_analysis.brent_baseline_usd
